title: Create Colonies
description: Build, automate, and decorate your world with Create, MineColonies, and rich decoration mods—combining semi-vanilla charm with endless engineering and design possibilities.
body:
⚙️ Create + Addons – Build jaw-dropping machines, dazzling contraptions, and automation that feels like magic.

🏰 MineColonies – Command your own thriving settlement with bustling citizens and endless expansion.

🌿 Semi-Vanilla Balance – Keep that classic Minecraft vibe while unlocking bold engineering and stunning decoration possibilities.



Unleash your creativity, design breathtaking builds, and watch your world come alive—this is Minecraft re-imagined for builders, tinkerers, and dreamers alike!
